name: FileNetImport
description: Drag-and-drop document and folder import widget for IBM FileNet Content Engine via GraphQL, used in IBM Business Automation Workflow

configOptions.name: graphqlEndpoint
configOptions.label: GraphQL Endpoint
configOptions.description: Full URL of the FileNet Content Engine GraphQL API endpoint

configOptions.name: parentFolderPath
configOptions.label: Parent Folder Path
configOptions.description: FileNet folder path where files will be imported

configOptions.name: maxFileSizeMB
configOptions.label: Max File Size (MB)
configOptions.description: Maximum allowed file size in megabytes

configOptions.name: allowedMimeTypes
configOptions.label: Allowed MIME Types
configOptions.description: Comma-separated list of accepted MIME types (empty = all types)

configOptions.name: documentClassIdentifier
configOptions.label: Document Class Identifier
configOptions.description: Optional FileNet document class identifier (symbolic name)

configOptions.name: folderClassIdentifier
configOptions.label: Folder Class Identifier
configOptions.description: Optional FileNet folder class identifier (symbolic name)

configOptions.name: onImportComplete
configOptions.label: On Import Complete
configOptions.description: Event fired when import completes successfully

configOptions.name: onImportError
configOptions.label: On Import Error
configOptions.description: Event fired when import encounters errors

configOptions.name: onFileAdded
configOptions.label: On File Added
configOptions.description: Event fired when a file is added to the import queue
